scenarios.name: convert-markdown-to-pdf-parallel
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers almost all rubric items except the final echo, while Response B fails the single-pipeline requirement and places the echo outside the pipeline.

scenarios.name: resume-csv-processing
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but lacks a named batch_with_resume() and proper KeyboardInterrupt handling, while Response B misses checkpoints, resume logic, and cleanup entirely.
